channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Want a cheap Yeti cooler for your 4th of July celebrations? I'm a deal-hunting outdoor expert, and I've tracked down the only holiday offers actually worth your money
item.description: Yeti coolers are going cheap, and you can get yours delivered in time for 4th July — these are the holiday discounts our outdoor expert has vetted for real value.

item.title: Meet NASAs new prototype rover for moon & mars
item.description: Meet ERNEST, NASA's prototype rover designed to test technologies that could support future exploration of the Moon and Mars.

item.title: Financial literacy for kids and teens: Mobile apps and features for family banking
item.description: Learn how family banking apps can teach kids and teens financial responsibility with spending controls, chores, savings goals, and more.

item.title: Adobe and Disney are teaming up to design the next generation of theme park rides with Foundry AI
item.description: Adobe and Disney will build a custom AI solution trained on the latter's IP and leveraging Adobe's Firefly Foundry service.

item.title: South Korea’s World Cup loss is now an official government matter
item.description: President Lee Jae Myung called for a formal review into South Korea’s early World Cup exit.

item.title: Samsung to take on the iPhone Pro with the new Galaxy S27 Pro?
item.description: Rumors suggest Samsung will introduce a Galaxy S27 Pro, offering Ultra-level performance in a smaller form factor alongside new privacy features.

item.title: Sensitive iPhone supplier details were part of last week's data leak at Tata Electronics
item.description: Some of Apple's corporate secrets aren't so secret any more.

item.title: Unlock your streaming service’s full catalog
item.description: Learn how a VPN can help you access different regional libraries on streaming services like Netflix and Disney+ when you're traveling.

item.title: I tested the Arc G3 Extreme inside MSI’s spendy Claw 8 EX AI+ handheld
item.description: See how Intel's Arc G3 Extreme processor performs inside the MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ and what kind of gaming performance you can expect.

item.title: IBM unveils new record-breaking chip with 100 billion transistors in less than 1 nanometer footprint — new NanoStack design is like "a 100-storey skyscraper" packed with highly efficient processing power
item.description: IBM unveiled a 0.7 nm NanoStack chip carrying 100 billion transistors through an ambitious three-dimensional architecture design.

item.title: Apple may have a plan to 'ease frustration over price hikes and longer delivery times' with its Macs — but I wouldn't count on it working
item.description: Analyst suggests more consumer RAM is going to data centers next year — maybe a lot more, and that's a real worry.
